gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/125)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/125)
text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) الصَّدَقَةُ تَدْفَعُ مِيتَةَ لسَّوْءِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim Bin Hashim, from his father, from Al Husayn Bin Yazeed Al Nowfaly,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘The charity repels the evil death’.
en.sarwar: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim ibn Hashim has narrated from his father, from al-Husayn ibn Yazid af-Nawfafiy from al-Sakuniy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, has said, ’Charity dispels wicked forms of death.’”
